reasoning: Converted 'Deciphering each Alaskan license plate abbreviation is lovely.' to a question resulted in 'Is deciphering each Alaskan license plate abbreviation lovely?', yielding IDEAL PAL.

Converted 'A new German exchange rate beneath a newspaper did assist national ambassadors.' to a question resulted in 'Did a new German exchange rate beneath a newspaper assist national ambassadors?', yielding DANGER BANANA.

Converted 'Every industrial geographer hired through your legal action was yelling enthusiastic random stuff.' to a question resulted in 'Was every industrial geographer hired through your legal action yelling enthusiastic random stuff?', yielding WEIGHTY LAYERS.
Negated 'Charming refrigerator operators will waltz into Greenland.' to 'Charming refrigerator operators will not waltz into Greenland', yielding CROWN WIG.
Negated 'Quiet utilitarians in crowded Kenyan city halls are talking.' to 'Quiet utilitarians in crowded Kenyan city halls are not talking', yielding QUICK CHANT.
